note: Day 27 (Thursday). CAMPAIGN MILESTONE DAY. Today's breakup emails fu_046-049 (leads 52/55/50/56, 09:00-09:45) complete the entire active campaign cohort. The same-day-as-breakup rule blocks all four remaining LinkedIn candidates. ZERO LinkedIn search queries today. No new leads (Batch 5 Ryedale data not received). The LinkedIn channel enters a holding pattern until Batch 5 initial emails have been sent for 3+ days. The full campaign cohort has now completed all 4 email touchpoints without any confirmed LinkedIn contact. Campaign dataset will not include LinkedIn conversion data for Batch 1-4.

next_linkedin_window.trigger: Batch 5 Ryedale data received AND initial emails sent AND 3+ days elapsed since those sends
next_linkedin_window.earliest_date: 2026-04-28 (Monday) — only if Batch 5 data received today (Thursday EOD) and initial sends fire Friday 2026-04-25
next_linkedin_window.most_likely_date: 2026-04-30 (Wednesday) or later — Batch 5 data not yet received as of this run
next_linkedin_window.linkedin_eligibility_rule: LinkedIn window opens Day 3 after initial email, must close before Day-7 follow-up. Window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive.
next_linkedin_window.priority_order: Full name + SSL signal first. Full name + mobile signal second. First-name-only leads: only attempt if sector has high LinkedIn presence (care, leisure, hospitality management, professional services).

batch_5_linkedin_strategy.confirmed_winner_sector: SSL leads with full names — 3 of 3 INTERESTED leads used SSL+PAS+first-name-subject combination
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.first_name_only_rule: Skip LinkedIn if first name only AND trade is low-LinkedIn (electrician, plumber, roofer, joiner, builder). Attempt LinkedIn if first name only AND sector is higher-LinkedIn (care, leisure, spa, gallery, solicitor, accountant, restaurant owner).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.note_strategy: Slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from AI slop. 200-char hard limit. Generic note is acceptable baseline. Upgrade to post_reference if HANDS finds post from last 60 days — post_reference achieves 3-4x higher acceptance rate.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.upgrade_instructions: HANDS: check profile for recent posts BEFORE sending any note. If post found (60 days): use post_reference template. If no post or profile inactive: use generic template. Write result to linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each search.

campaign_milestone.trigger: fu_049 sent today (Neil, East Riding Electrical, ~09:45)
campaign_milestone.milestone: After fu_049: ALL active sequences complete. 60+ leads through all 4 touchpoints. Full dataset available for analysis.
campaign_milestone.linkedin_channel_summary: ZERO confirmed LinkedIn contacts in entire Batch 1-4 campaign. Seven consecutive BRAIN runs without linkedin_profiles.json. LinkedIn channel was architecturally designed and daily-planned but operationally unexecuted by HANDS throughout the campaign.
campaign_milestone.key_learning: For Batch 5: HANDS must commit to LinkedIn execution within 2 hours of each BRAIN run. The BRAIN output is solid — the operational gap is execution latency. LinkedIn notes have a narrow window (Day 3-6) that cannot be recovered once missed.
campaign_milestone.analysis_due: 2026-04-25 (Friday) — BRAIN to write full post-campaign analysis including LinkedIn channel failure assessment and revised execution protocol for Batch 5.
